query: SELECT i.id, i.invoice_number, i.project_id, p.title as project_title, p.project_number, p.customer_id, c.name as customer_name, c.company as customer_company FROM invoices i LEFT JOIN projects p ON p.id = i.project_id LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.id = p.customer_id WHERE i.invoice_number = 'AN-2026-1862' LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 9NNjvn7NV7enobv.7ea640e70a8c --database YMZow7uQxpBVyBGbmbpvvd --execute SELECT i.id, i.invoice_number, i.project_id, p.title as project_title, p.project_number, p.customer_id, c.name as customer_name, c.company as customer_company FROM invoices i LEFT JOIN projects p ON p.id = i.project_id LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.id = p.customer_id WHERE i.invoice_number = 'AN-2026-1862' LIMIT 1;
